info.title: Meal Direct API
info.description: Stable REST API for Meal Direct web and future mobile clients.

idempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
idempotencyKey.description: Required for important mutations such as order creation and payments.

requestId.name: x-request-id
requestId.description: Optional caller-provided request ID. The API echoes or generates one.

operationsToken.description: Internal operations token. Temporary until Super Admin JWT/RBAC is implemented.

email.description: The email address of the user.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role assigned to the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.
The email address of the user.

displayName.description: Display name shown in Meal Direct operational surfaces.

phoneNumber.description: Nigerian or international phone number for delivery coordination.

avatarUrl.description: Profile image URL mirrored from the identity provider or user settings.

deliveryTime.description: Campus local delivery time in HH:mm or HH:mm:ss.
Campus local delivery time in HH:mm or HH:mm:ss.

tokenRefreshRequired.description: Always true: the client must refresh its session so the new vendor_id appears in the JWT.

accountNumber.description: Full account number for masking before storage.

hasMore.description: True when another page is available.

limit.description: Limit applied to the current page.

nextCursor.description: Cursor to request the next page.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

dateFrom.description: Inclusive ISO-8601 lower bound for date filtering.

dateTo.description: Inclusive ISO-8601 upper bound for date filtering.

requestId.description: Request identifier for support and log correlation.

amountCents.description: Amount in the smallest currency unit.

sort.description: Sort expression in field:direction form, or -field for descending.
